title: The Night the Moon Fell Asleep
content:
Once the moon stayed up too late.

She watched the children play all day.

Then she watched the stars come out.

Soon she felt very, very sleepy.

"I will just close my eyes for a moment," said the moon.

The moon fell asleep!

The night became very dark.

"Where is the moon?" asked a little owl.

"She fell asleep," said a wise old star.

The stars shone extra bright that night.

They lit the way for all the animals.

When morning came, the sun woke the moon.

"Oh my!" said the moon. "I fell asleep!"

"Don't worry," said the sun. "The stars helped out."

From that night on, the moon always took a nap during the day.

So she could stay awake all night long.

Goodnight, little one. Sleep tight.

The End.
